message.content:
Replace all FlexCell.Grid references with standard DataGridView in the NX4C FRT solution projects.

Base path: C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC CHINA NX4\NX4C FRT\NX4C FRT\

## Projects to modify (all are VB.NET):
1. JA01\ (vbproj: FRT JA01.vbproj)
2. JA02\ (vbproj: FRT JA02.vbproj — note there may also be "FRT PWR 2.vbproj")
3. JA03\ (vbproj: FRT JA03.vbproj)
4. JA04\ (vbproj: FRT JA04.vbproj)
5. SERVER SEARCH\ (vbproj: SERVEr Search.vbproj)

## What to change in EACH project:

### 1. .vbproj file
Remove the FlexCell reference block (3 lines):
```xml
    <Reference Include="FlexCell, Version=4.3.7.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=6f86587eb70ee309, processorArchitecture=MSIL">
      <SpecificVersion>False</SpecificVersion>
      <HintPath>C:\Program Files (x86)\FlexCell Technologies\FlexCell.NET4\bin\FlexCell.dll</HintPath>
    </Reference>
```

### 2. FrmMain.Designer.vb — I/O Monitor Grid
Replace FlexCell.Grid declaration and initialization with DataGridView.

**Declaration line** (at bottom of file):
Change: `Friend WithEvents Grid1 As FlexCell.Grid`
To: `Friend WithEvents Grid1 As System.Windows.Forms.DataGridView`

**Constructor line**:
Change: `Me.Grid1 = New FlexCell.Grid()`
To: `Me.Grid1 = New System.Windows.Forms.DataGridView()`

**Properties section** — replace the entire Grid1 property block. The FlexCell block looks like:
```vb
Me.Grid1.BorderStyle = FlexCell.BorderStyleEnum.None
Me.Grid1.CheckedImage = Nothing
Me.Grid1.DefaultFont = New System.Drawing.Font(...)
Me.Grid1.DefaultRowHeight = CType(45, Short)
Me.Grid1.Dock = System.Windows.Forms.DockStyle.Fill
Me.Grid1.Font = ...
Me.Grid1.GridColor = ...
Me.Grid1.Location = ...
Me.Grid1.Name = "Grid1"
Me.Grid1.ScrollBars = FlexCell.ScrollBarsEnum.None
Me.Grid1.Size = ...
Me.Grid1.TabIndex = ...
Me.Grid1.UncheckedImage = Nothing
```

Replace with (keep the original Location, Size, TabIndex, Dock values from the file):
```vb
Me.Grid1.AllowUserToAddRows = False
Me.Grid1.AllowUserToDeleteRows = False
Me.Grid1.AllowUserToResizeRows = False
Me.Grid1.BorderStyle = System.Windows.Forms.BorderStyle.None
Me.Grid1.ColumnHeadersHeightSizeMode = System.Windows.Forms.DataGridViewColumnHeadersHeightSizeMode.AutoSize
Me.Grid1.DefaultCellStyle.Font = New System.Drawing.Font("Arial Narrow", 26.0!)
Me.Grid1.Dock = System.Windows.Forms.DockStyle.Fill
Me.Grid1.Location = (keep original)
Me.Grid1.Name = "Grid1"
Me.Grid1.ReadOnly = True
Me.Grid1.RowHeadersVisible = False
Me.Grid1.RowTemplate.Height = 45
Me.Grid1.ScrollBars = System.Windows.Forms.ScrollBars.None
Me.Grid1.Size = (keep original)
Me.Grid1.TabIndex = (keep original)
```

### 3. FrmMain.vb — Init_Grid method
Replace the FlexCell Init_Grid method. Find:
```vb
    Private Sub Init_Grid(ByVal GridName As FlexCell.Grid)
        ...
    End Sub
```
Replace with:
```vb
    Private Sub Init_Grid(ByVal GridName As DataGridView)

        With GridName
            .Columns.Clear()
            .Rows.Clear()

            .Columns.Add("Col0", "")
            .Columns.Add("Col1", "No.")
            .Columns.Add("Col2", "I/O")
            .Columns.Add("Col3", "Dec.")

            .Columns(0).Width = 0
            .Columns(0).Visible = False
            .Columns(1).Width = 60
            .Columns(2).Width = 80
            .Columns(3).Width = 100

            For Each col As DataGridViewColumn In .Columns
                col.DefaultCellStyle.Alignment = DataGridViewContentAlignment.MiddleCenter
                col.HeaderCell.Style.Alignment = DataGridViewContentAlignment.MiddleCenter
                col.SortMode = DataGridViewColumnSortMode.NotSortable
            Next

        End With

    End Sub
```

### 4. FrmPart.Designer.vb — Part Master Grid
Same pattern:
- `Friend WithEvents Grid1 As FlexCell.Grid` → `Friend WithEvents Grid1 As System.Windows.Forms.DataGridView`
- `Me.Grid1 = New FlexCell.Grid()` → `Me.Grid1 = New System.Windows.Forms.DataGridView()`
- Replace FlexCell properties with DataGridView equivalent (keep Location, Size, TabIndex):
```vb
Me.Grid1.AllowUserToAddRows = True
Me.Grid1.AllowUserToDeleteRows = True
Me.Grid1.BorderStyle = System.Windows.Forms.BorderStyle.FixedSingle
Me.Grid1.ColumnHeadersHeightSizeMode = System.Windows.Forms.DataGridViewColumnHeadersHeightSizeMode.AutoSize
Me.Grid1.DefaultCellStyle.Font = New System.Drawing.Font("Tahoma", 10.2!)
Me.Grid1.Location = (keep original)
Me.Grid1.Name = "Grid1"
Me.Grid1.RowHeadersVisible = False
Me.Grid1.RowTemplate.Height = 24
Me.Grid1.Size = (keep original)
Me.Grid1.TabIndex = (keep original)
```

### 5. FrmPart.vb — Part Master Code
Replace FlexCell API calls with DataGridView equivalents:

In `SetDataBinding()`:
Replace:
```vb
Grid1.BoldFixedCell = False
Grid1.DisplayFocusRect = False
Grid1.DisplayRowArrow = True
Grid1.SetDataBinding(myDataSet, "TablePART")
Grid1.Column(0).Width = 10
...column widths...
Grid1.Column(8).CellType = FlexCell.CellTypeEnum.CheckBox
Grid1.Column(9).CellType = FlexCell.CellTypeEnum.CheckBox
```
With:
```vb
Grid1.DataSource = myDataSet.Tables("TablePART")

If Grid1.Columns.Count > 0 Then
    Grid1.Columns(0).Width = 10
    Grid1.Columns(0).Visible = False
    If Grid1.Columns.Count > 1 Then Grid1.Columns(1).Visible = False
    If Grid1.Columns.Count > 2 Then Grid1.Columns(2).Width = 110
    If Grid1.Columns.Count > 3 Then Grid1.Columns(3).Width = 200
    If Grid1.Columns.Count > 4 Then Grid1.Columns(4).Width = 80
    If Grid1.Columns.Count > 5 Then Grid1.Columns(5).Width = 80
    If Grid1.Columns.Count > 6 Then Grid1.Columns(6).Width = 80
    If Grid1.Columns.Count > 7 Then Grid1.Columns(7).Width = 80
    If Grid1.Columns.Count > 8 Then Grid1.Columns(8).Width = 80
    If Grid1.Columns.Count > 9 Then Grid1.Columns(9).Width = 80
End If
```
Also remove all commented FlexCell lines.

In `Save_Grid()`:
Replace:
```vb
Grid1.EndCurrentEdit()
```
With:
```vb
Grid1.EndEdit()
```

Replace:
```vb
intTopRow = Grid1.TopRow
intCurrentRow = Grid1.ActiveCell.Row
intCurrentCol = Grid1.ActiveCell.Col
```
With:
```vb
intTopRow = Grid1.FirstDisplayedScrollingRowIndex
If Grid1.CurrentCell IsNot Nothing Then
    intCurrentRow = Grid1.CurrentCell.RowIndex
    intCurrentCol = Grid1.CurrentCell.ColumnIndex
End If
```

Replace:
```vb
Grid1.AutoRedraw = False
SetDataBinding()
Grid1.Cell(intCurrentRow, intCurrentCol).SetFocus()
Grid1.TopRow = intTopRow
Grid1.AutoRedraw = True
Grid1.Refresh()
```
With:
```vb
SetDataBinding()
If intCurrentRow < Grid1.Rows.Count AndAlso intCurrentCol < Grid1.Columns.Count Then
    Grid1.CurrentCell = Grid1(intCurrentCol, intCurrentRow)
End If
If intTopRow >= 0 AndAlso intTopRow < Grid1.Rows.Count Then
    Grid1.FirstDisplayedScrollingRowIndex = intTopRow
End If
Grid1.Refresh()
```

### 6. FrmSearch.Designer.vb
Same pattern for Grid1 replacement:
- Declaration, constructor, properties
- AllowUserToAddRows = False, ReadOnly = True

### 7. FrmSearch.vb
Replace:
```vb
Grid1.BoldFixedCell = False
Grid1.DisplayFocusRect = False
Grid1.DisplayRowArrow = True
Grid1.SetDataBinding(myDataSet, "Table_Main")
```
With:
```vb
Grid1.DataSource = myDataSet.Tables("Table_Main")
```

Replace `Grid1.ExportToExcel(...)` with CSV export:
```vb
    Private Sub ConvertExcel()
        Dim excel_name As String = Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "_" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd")
        Dim filePath As String = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Excel\" & excel_name & ".csv"

        Try
            If Not System.IO.Directory.Exists(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Excel") Then
                System.IO.Directory.CreateDirectory(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Excel")
            End If

            Using sw As New System.IO.StreamWriter(filePath, False, System.Text.Encoding.Default)
                Dim headers As New System.Text.StringBuilder()
                For Each col As DataGridViewColumn In Grid1.Columns
                    If headers.Length > 0 Then headers.Append(",")
                    headers.Append("""" & col.HeaderText.Replace("""", """""") & """")
                Next
                sw.WriteLine(headers.ToString())

                For Each row As DataGridViewRow In Grid1.Rows
                    Dim line As New System.Text.StringBuilder()
                    For Each cell As DataGridViewCell In row.Cells
                        If line.Length > 0 Then line.Append(",")
                        Dim val As String = If(cell.Value IsNot Nothing, cell.Value.ToString(), "")
                        line.Append("""" & val.Replace("""", """""") & """")
                    Next
                    sw.WriteLine(line.ToString())
                Next
            End Using

            MsgBox("Done.", MsgBoxStyle.Exclamation)
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox(ex.Message, MsgBoxStyle.Critical)
        End Try
    End Sub
```

### 8. FrmWorkStandardSet.Designer.vb
Replace Grid1 declaration, constructor, properties:
```vb
Me.Grid1.AllowUserToAddRows = False
Me.Grid1.BorderStyle = System.Windows.Forms.BorderStyle.FixedSingle
Me.Grid1.ColumnHeadersHeightSizeMode = System.Windows.Forms.DataGridViewColumnHeadersHeightSizeMode.AutoSize
Me.Grid1.DefaultCellStyle.Font = New System.Drawing.Font("Arial Narrow", 12.0!)
Me.Grid1.Location = (keep original)
Me.Grid1.Margin = (keep original)
Me.Grid1.Name = "Grid1"
Me.Grid1.RowHeadersVisible = False
Me.Grid1.RowTemplate.Height = 20
Me.Grid1.ScrollBars = System.Windows.Forms.ScrollBars.Vertical
Me.Grid1.Size = (keep original)
Me.Grid1.TabIndex = (keep original)
```

### 9. FrmWorkStandardSet.vb
Replace Grid_Init:
```vb
    Private Sub Grid_Init()
        With Grid1
            .Columns.Clear()
            .Rows.Clear()

            .Columns.Add("Col0", "")
            .Columns.Add("Col1", "")
            .Columns.Add("Col2", "ImageFile")

            .Columns(0).Width = 10
            .Columns(0).Visible = False
            .Columns(1).Width = 30
            .Columns(2).Width = 500

            .AllowUserToAddRows = False
        End With
    End Sub
```

In Load_Grid, replace `.AddItem(Rs.Fields("ID").Value & Chr(9) & Rs.Fields("StandardFile").Value)` with:
```vb
Grid1.Rows.Add(Nothing, Rs.Fields("ID").Value, Rs.Fields("StandardFile").Value)
```
Remove the `With Grid1` / `End With` wrapper around the data loading since we access Grid1 directly.

In Save_Grid, replace `Grid1.Cell(1, 2).Text` and `Grid1.Cell(i, 2).Text` with:
```vb
Grid1.Rows(0).Cells(2).Value?.ToString()  ' for single record (was i=1 in FlexCell, now i=0 in DGV)
Grid1.Rows(i).Cells(2).Value?.ToString()  ' in loop, i starts at 0 now
```
IMPORTANT: FlexCell was 1-based (row 0 = header), DataGridView is 0-based. Adjust loop start from `i = 1` to `i = 0`.

In Grid1_MouseClick1, replace:
```vb
Click_Index = Grid1.Selection.FirstRow
tmp = Grid1.Cell(Click_Index, 2).Text
...
Grid1.Cell(Click_Index, 2).Text = tmp  ' or Open.FileName
```
With:
```vb
If Grid1.CurrentRow Is Nothing Then Return
Click_Index = Grid1.CurrentRow.Index
tmp = If(Grid1.Rows(Click_Index).Cells(2).Value IsNot Nothing, Grid1.Rows(Click_Index).Cells(2).Value.ToString(), "")
...
Grid1.Rows(Click_Index).Cells(2).Value = tmp  ' or Open.FileName
```

In Delete button handler, replace:
```vb
Grid1.Cell(Click_Index, 1).Text
```
With:
```vb
If(Grid1.Rows(Click_Index).Cells(1).Value IsNot Nothing, Grid1.Rows(Click_Index).Cells(1).Value.ToString(), "")
```

Remove `Grid1_Load` event handler (DataGridView doesn't have Load event).

### 10. FrmAngleSet (JA03 only)
Check if FrmAngleSet.vb and FrmAngleSet.Designer.vb exist and apply similar replacement pattern.

## CRITICAL RULES:
1. READ each file before editing — never edit blind
2. Keep original Location, Size, TabIndex, Margin, Dock values exactly as they were
3. Remove ALL FlexCell enum references
4. Do NOT modify any non-FlexCell related code
5. Process each project completely before moving to the next
6. Start with JA01, then JA02, JA03, JA04, SERVER SEARCH
7. Check if "FRT PWR 2.vbproj" in JA02 also has FlexCell references and fix it too

   102→    Private Sub GetDataSet()
   103→
   104→        Dim conn As OleDbConnection
   105→
   106→        Dim Qurry1 As String = "SELECT * FROM Table_PART ORDER BY LEN(PART_NO),PART_NO"
   107→
   108→        Dim ConString As String = "Provider=Microsoft.jet.OLEDB.4.0; Data Source=" & System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\DB\DB.mdb"
   109→
   110→        conn = New OleDbConnection
   111→        conn.ConnectionString = ConString
   112→        conn.Open()
   113→        myDataSet = New DataSet
   114→
   115→        myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry1, conn)
   116→        myDataAdapter.Fill(myDataSet, "Table_PART")
   117→        conn.Close()
   118→
   119→    End Sub

   121→    Private Sub Save_Grid()
   122→
   123→        Dim intTopRow, intCurrentRow, intCurrentCol As Integer
   124→        Dim myCommandBuilder As System.Data.OleDb.OleDbCommandBuilder
   125→
   126→        'End the current edit operation
   127→        Grid1.EndCurrentEdit()
   128→
   129→        'Command
   130→        myCommandBuilder = New System.Data.OleDb.OleDbCommandBuilder(myDataAdapter)
   131→        myDataAdapter.DeleteCommand = myCommandBuilder.GetDeleteCommand()
   132→        myDataAdapter.UpdateCommand = myCommandBuilder.GetUpdateCommand()
   133→        myDataAdapter.InsertCommand = myCommandBuilder.GetInsertCommand()
   134→
   135→        Try
   136→            'Save to database
   137→            myDataAdapter.Update(myDataSet.Tables("Table_Part"))
   138→        Catch ex As Exception
   139→            myCommandBuilder.Dispose()
   140→            MsgBox(ex.Message, MsgBoxStyle.Exclamation)
   141→            Return
   142→        End Try
   143→
   144→        myCommandBuilder.Dispose()
   145→        myDataSet.Dispose()
   146→        myDataAdapter.Dispose()
   147→
   148→        'Grid status
   149→        intTopRow = Grid1.TopRow
   150→        intCurrentRow = Grid1.ActiveCell.Row
   151→        intCurrentCol = Grid1.ActiveCell.Col
   152→
   153→        'Re-bind
   154→        Grid1.AutoRedraw = False
   155→        SetDataBinding()
   156→        Grid1.Cell(intCurrentRow, intCurrentCol).SetFocus()
   157→        Grid1.TopRow = intTopRow
   158→        Grid1.AutoRedraw = True
   159→        Grid1.Refresh()
   160→
   161→        MsgBox("Save Complete.", MsgBoxStyle.Exclamation)
   162→
   163→    End Sub

   170→    Sub Part_Print(str1 As String, str2 As String)
   171→
   172→        FrmMain.Serial_Printer.Write("^XA")
   173→        FrmMain.Serial_Printer.Write("^FO" & "60" & "," & "60" & "^BY5^BXN," & "7" & "," & "200" & ",,,,^FH^FD" & str1 & "^FS")
   174→        FrmMain.Serial_Printer.Write("^FO" & "220" & "," & "60" & "^A0N," & "60" & "," & "30" & "^FD" & str1 & "^FS")
   175→        FrmMain.Serial_Printer.Write("^FO" & "220" & "," & "150" & "^A0N," & "60" & "," & "30" & "^FD" & str2 & "^FS")
   176→        FrmMain.Serial_Printer.Write("^XZ")
   177→
   178→    End Sub

   180→    Private Sub Button3_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button3.Click
   181→
   182→        Connection_Open_MDB()
   183→
   184→        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
   185→        Dim i As Integer
   186→
   187→        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
   188→        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
   189→        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
   190→
   191→        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_PArt ORDER BY LEN(PART_NO),PART_NO", Mdb_Connect)
   192→
   193→        If Rs.RecordCount > 1 Then
   194→
   195→            Rs.MoveFirst()
   196→            i = 1
   197→            Do Until Rs.EOF
   198→                Part_Print(Rs.Fields("PART_NO").Value, Rs.Fields("PART_NO").Value)
   199→                Rs.MoveNext()
   200→            Loop
   201→
   202→        End If
   203→
   204→        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
   205→        Rs.Close()
   206→
   207→        Connection_Close_MDB()
   208→
   209→    End Sub

    20→    Private Sub SetDataBinding()
    21→
    22→        GetDataSet()
    23→
    24→        Grid1.BoldFixedCell = False

    26→        Grid1.DisplayRowArrow = True

    31→    Private Sub GetDataSet()
    32→
    33→        Dim conn As OleDbConnection
    34→
    35→        Dim Qurry1 As String = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE (JA01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
    36→                        "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "')"
    37→
    38→        Dim Qurry2 As String = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE (JA01_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
    39→                        "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "') AND (LINE_SERIAL LIKE '%" & srcTxtSerial.Text & "%')"
    40→
    41→        Dim ConString As String = "Provider=Microsoft.jet.OLEDB.4.0; Data Source=" & System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\DB\DB.mdb"
    42→
    43→        conn = New OleDbConnection
    44→        conn.ConnectionString = ConString
    45→        conn.Open()
    46→        myDataSet = New DataSet
    47→        If srcTxtSerial.Text = "" Then
    48→            myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry1, conn)
    49→        Else
    50→            myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry2, conn)
    51→        End If
    52→
    53→        myDataAdapter.Fill(myDataSet, "Table_Main")
    54→        conn.Close()
    55→
    56→    End Sub

    58→    Private Sub ConvertExcel()
    59→
    60→        Dim excel_name As String = Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "_" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd")
    61→
    62→        If Grid1.ExportToExcel(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Excel\" & excel_name & ".xls", True) Then
    63→
    64→            MsgBox("Done.", MsgBoxStyle.Exclamation)
    65→
    66→        End If
    67→
    68→    End Sub

    37→    Private Sub Load_Grid()
    38→
    39→        Connection_Open_MDB()
    40→
    41→        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
    42→
    43→        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
    44→        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
    45→        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
    46→
    47→        Grid_Init()
    48→
    49→        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Image", Mdb_Connect)
    50→
    51→        With Grid1
    52→
    53→            If Rs.RecordCount <= 0 Then
    54→
    55→                'MsgBox("Empty Point Info.")
    56→
    57→            ElseIf Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
    58→
    59→                .AddItem(Rs.Fields("ID").Value & Chr(9) & Rs.Fields("StandardFile").Value)
    60→
    61→            Else
    62→
    63→                Rs.MoveFirst()
    64→                Do Until Rs.EOF
    65→                    .AddItem(Rs.Fields("ID").Value & Chr(9) & Rs.Fields("StandardFile").Value)
    66→                    Rs.MoveNext()
    67→                Loop
    68→
    69→            End If
    70→
    71→            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing

    80→    Private Sub Save_Grid()
    81→
    82→        Connection_Open_MDB()
    83→
    84→        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

    87→        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient

   105→
   106→                Rs.MoveFirst()

   107→            MsgBox("Check PWR / MNL")
   108→
   109→        End If
   110→
   111→    End Sub
   112→

   114→        ConvertExcel()
   115→    End Sub
   116→

    89→    Private Sub GetDataSet()
    90→
    91→        Dim conn As OleDbConnection
    92→
    93→        Dim Qurry1 As String = "SELECT * FROM Table_PART ORDER BY LEN(PART_NO),PART_NO"
    94→
    95→        Dim ConString As String = "Provider=Microsoft.jet.OLEDB.4.0; Data Source=" & System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\DB\DB.mdb"
    96→
    97→        conn = New OleDbConnection
    98→        conn.ConnectionString = ConString
    99→        conn.Open()
   100→        myDataSet = New DataSet
   101→
   102→        myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry1, conn)
   103→        myDataAdapter.Fill(myDataSet, "Table_PART")
   104→        conn.Close()
   105→
   106→    End Sub

   108→    Private Sub Save_Grid()
   109→
   110→        Dim intTopRow, intCurrentRow, intCurrentCol As Integer
   111→        Dim myCommandBuilder As System.Data.OleDb.OleDbCommandBuilder
   112→
   113→        'End the current edit operation
   114→        Grid1.EndCurrentEdit()
   115→
   116→        'Command
   117→        myCommandBuilder = New System.Data.OleDb.OleDbCommandBuilder(myDataAdapter)
   118→        myDataAdapter.DeleteCommand = myCommandBuilder.GetDeleteCommand()
   119→        myDataAdapter.UpdateCommand = myCommandBuilder.GetUpdateCommand()
   120→        myDataAdapter.InsertCommand = myCommandBuilder.GetInsertCommand()
   121→
   122→        Try
   123→            'Save to database
   124→            myDataAdapter.Update(myDataSet.Tables("Table_Part"))
   125→        Catch ex As Exception
   126→            myCommandBuilder.Dispose()
   127→            MsgBox(ex.Message, MsgBoxStyle.Exclamation)
   128→            Return
   129→        End Try
   130→
   131→        myCommandBuilder.Dispose()
   132→        myDataSet.Dispose()
   133→        myDataAdapter.Dispose()
   134→
   135→        'Grid status
   136→        intTopRow = Grid1.TopRow
   137→        intCurrentRow = Grid1.ActiveCell.Row
   138→        intCurrentCol = Grid1.ActiveCell.Col
   139→
   140→        'Re-bind
   141→        Grid1.AutoRedraw = False
   142→        SetDataBinding()
   143→        Grid1.Cell(intCurrentRow, intCurrentCol).SetFocus()
   144→        Grid1.TopRow = intTopRow
   145→        Grid1.AutoRedraw = True
   146→        Grid1.Refresh()
   147→
   148→        MsgBox("Save Complete.", MsgBoxStyle.Exclamation)
   149→
   150→    End Sub

   156→    Sub Part_Print(str1 As String, str2 As String)
   157→
   158→        FrmMain.Serial_Printer.Write("^XA")
   159→        FrmMain.Serial_Printer.Write("^FO" & "60" & "," & "60" & "^BY5^BXN," & "7" & "," & "200" & ",,,,^FH^FD" & str1 & "^FS")
   160→        FrmMain.Serial_Printer.Write("^FO" & "170" & "," & "60" & "^A0N," & "60" & "," & "30" & "^FD" & str1 & "^FS")
   161→        FrmMain.Serial_Printer.Write("^FO" & "170" & "," & "120" & "^A0N," & "60" & "," & "30" & "^FD" & str2 & "^FS")
   162→        FrmMain.Serial_Printer.Write("^XZ")
   163→
   164→    End Sub

   167→    Private Sub Button3_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button3.Click
   168→
   169→
   170→        Connection_Open_MDB()
   171→
   172→        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
   173→        Dim i As Integer
   174→
   175→        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
   176→        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
   177→        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
   178→
   179→        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_PArt ORDER BY LEN(PART_NO),PART_NO", Mdb_Connect)
   180→
   181→        If Rs.RecordCount > 1 Then
   182→
   183→            Rs.MoveFirst()
   184→            i = 1
   185→            Do Until Rs.EOF
   186→                Part_Print(Rs.Fields("PART_NO").Value, Rs.Fields("PART_NO").Value)
   187→                Rs.MoveNext()
   188→            Loop
   189→
   190→        End If

    20→    Private Sub SetDataBinding()
    21→
    22→        GetDataSet()
    23→
    24→        Grid1.BoldFixedCell = False

    26→        Grid1.DisplayRowArrow = True

    31→    Private Sub GetDataSet()
    32→
    33→        Dim conn As OleDbConnection
    34→
    35→        Dim Qurry1 As String = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE (JA02_Date BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
    36→                        "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "')"
    37→
    38→        Dim Qurry2 As String = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE (JA02_Date BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
    39→                        "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "') AND (LINE_SERIAL LIKE '%" & srcTxtSerial.Text & "%')"
    40→
    41→        Dim ConString As String = "Provider=Microsoft.jet.OLEDB.4.0; Data Source=" & System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\DB\DB.mdb"
    42→
    43→        conn = New OleDbConnection
    44→        conn.ConnectionString = ConString
    45→        conn.Open()
    46→        myDataSet = New DataSet
    47→        If srcTxtSerial.Text = "" Then
    48→            myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry1, conn)
    49→        Else
    50→            myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry2, conn)
    51→        End If
    52→
    53→        myDataAdapter.Fill(myDataSet, "Table_Main")
    54→        conn.Close()
    55→
    56→    End Sub

    58→    Private Sub ConvertExcel()
    59→
    60→        Dim excel_name As String = Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "_" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd")
    61→
    62→        If Grid1.ExportToExcel(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Excel\" & excel_name & ".xls", True) Then
    63→
    64→            MsgBox("Done.", MsgBoxStyle.Exclamation)
    65→
    66→        End If
    67→
    68→    End Sub

    37→    Private Sub Load_Grid()
    38→
    39→        Connection_Open_MDB()
    40→
    41→        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
    42→
    43→        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
    44→        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
    45→        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
    46→
    47→        Grid_Init()
    48→
    49→        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Image", Mdb_Connect)
    50→
    51→        With Grid1
    52→
    53→            If Rs.RecordCount <= 0 Then
    54→
    55→                'MsgBox("Empty Point Info.")
    56→
    57→            ElseIf Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
    58→
    59→                .AddItem(Rs.Fields("ID").Value & Chr(9) & Rs.Fields("StandardFile").Value)
    60→
    61→            Else
    62→
    63→                Rs.MoveFirst()
    64→                Do Until Rs.EOF
    65→                    .AddItem(Rs.Fields("ID").Value & Chr(9) & Rs.Fields("StandardFile").Value)
    66→                    Rs.MoveNext()
    67→                Loop
    68→
    69→            End If
    70→

    80→    Private Sub Save_Grid()
    81→
    82→        Connection_Open_MDB()
    83→
    84→        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

    87→        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient

   100→
   101→                Rs.Fields("StandardFile").Value = Grid1.Cell(1, 2).Text

   105→
   106→                Rs.MoveFirst()

    10→    Private mstrDatabase As String
    11→    Private myDataAdapter As OleDbDataAdapter
    12→    Private myDataSet As DataSet
    13→    '******************************************************************************

    20→    Private Sub SetDataBinding()
    21→
    22→        GetDataSet()
    23→
    24→        Grid1.BoldFixedCell = False
    25→        Grid1.DisplayFocusRect = False
    26→        Grid1.DisplayRowArrow = True
    27→        Grid1.SetDataBinding(myDataSet, "Table_Main")
    28→
    29→    End Sub
    30→
    31→    Private Sub GetDataSet()
    32→
    33→        Dim conn As OleDbConnection
    34→
    35→        Dim Qurry1 As String = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE (JA04_Date BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
    36→                        "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "')"
    37→
    38→        Dim Qurry2 As String = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE (JA04_Date BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
    39→                        "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "') AND (LINE_SERIAL LIKE '%" & srcTxtSerial.Text & "%')"
    40→
    41→        Dim ConString As String = "Provider=Microsoft.jet.OLEDB.4.0; Data Source=" & System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\DB\DB.mdb"
    42→
    43→        conn = New OleDbConnection
    44→        conn.ConnectionString = ConString
    45→        conn.Open()
    46→        myDataSet = New DataSet
    47→        If srcTxtSerial.Text = "" Then
    48→            myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry1, conn)
    49→        Else
    50→            myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry2, conn)
    51→        End If
    52→
    53→        myDataAdapter.Fill(myDataSet, "Table_Main")
    54→        conn.Close()
    55→
    56→    End Sub
    57→
    58→    Private Sub ConvertExcel()
    59→
    60→        Dim excel_name As String = Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "_" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd")
    61→
    62→        If Grid1.ExportToExcel(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Excel\" & excel_name & ".xls", True) Then
    63→
    64→            MsgBox("Done.", MsgBoxStyle.Exclamation)
    65→
    66→        End If
    67→
    68→    End Sub

    74→        SetDataBinding()
    75→    End Sub
    76→

    78→        ConvertExcel()
    79→    End Sub

   161→        FrmMain.Serial_Printer.Write("^FO" & "170" & "," & "120" & "^A0N," & "60" & "," & "30" & "^FD" & str2 & "^FS")

   181→

    20→    Private Sub SetDataBinding()
    21→
    22→        GetDataSet()
    23→
    24→        Grid1.BoldFixedCell = False
    25→        Grid1.DisplayFocusRect = False
    26→        Grid1.DisplayRowArrow = True
    27→        Grid1.SetDataBinding(myDataSet, "Table_Main")
    28→

    31→    Private Sub GetDataSet()
    32→
    33→        Dim conn As OleDbConnection
    34→
    35→        Dim Qurry1 As String = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE (JA04_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
    36→                        "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "')"
    37→
    38→        Dim Qurry2 As String = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main WHERE (JA04_DATE BETWEEN '" & Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") &
    39→                        "' AND '" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "') AND (SERIAL_NUMBER LIKE '%" & srcTxtSerial.Text & "%')"
    40→
    41→        Dim ConString As String = "Provider=Microsoft.jet.OLEDB.4.0; Data Source=" & System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\DB\DB.mdb"
    42→
    43→        conn = New OleDbConnection
    44→        conn.ConnectionString = ConString
    45→        conn.Open()
    46→        myDataSet = New DataSet
    47→        If srcTxtSerial.Text = "" Then
    48→            myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry1, conn)
    49→        Else
    50→            myDataAdapter = New OleDbDataAdapter(Qurry2, conn)
    51→        End If
    52→
    53→        myDataAdapter.Fill(myDataSet, "Table_Main")
    54→        conn.Close()
    55→
    56→    End Sub
    57→
    58→    Private Sub ConvertExcel()
    59→
    60→        Dim excel_name As String = Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "_" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd")
    61→
    62→        If Grid1.ExportToExcel(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Excel\" & excel_name & ".xls", True) Then
    63→
    64→            MsgBox("Done.", MsgBoxStyle.Exclamation)
    65→
    66→        End If
    67→
    68→    End Sub

    78→        ConvertExcel()

content.text: Now I have all the information I need. The files across projects are very similar. Let me now create a comprehensive PowerShell script to do all the replacements at once, since there are dozens of edits and doing them one by one would be extremely tedious.

input.command:
cat > /tmp/fix_flexcell.ps1 << 'ENDSCRIPT'
$base = "C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DSC CHINA NX4\NX4C FRT\NX4C FRT"

# ============================================================
# Helper: Remove FlexCell reference from vbproj
# ============================================================
function Remove-FlexCellRef($path) {
    $content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText($path)
    # Pattern 1: 3-line block with HintPath
    $content = $content -replace '(?m)\s*<Reference Include="FlexCell[^"]*">\s*\r?\n\s*<SpecificVersion>False</SpecificVersion>\s*\r?\n\s*<HintPath>[^<]*</HintPath>\s*\r?\n\s*</Reference>', ''
    # Pattern 2: single-line reference (SERVER SEARCH)
    $content = $content -replace '(?m)\s*<Reference Include="FlexCell[^"]*"\s*/>', ''
    [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText($path, $content)
    Write-Host "  [vbproj] $path"
}

# ============================================================
# JA01-JA04 FrmMain.Designer.vb: replace Grid1 FlexCell properties
# ============================================================
function Fix-FrmMainDesigner($path) {
    $content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText($path)
    
    # Constructor line
    $content = $content -replace 'Me\.Grid1 = New FlexCell\.Grid\(\)', 'Me.Grid1 = New System.Windows.Forms.DataGridView()'
    
    # Properties block - replace the entire Grid1 section
    # Match from 'Me.Grid1.BorderStyle = FlexCell' or 'Me.Grid1.CheckedImage' to 'Me.Grid1.UncheckedImage = Nothing'
    $pattern = '(?s)(''Grid1\s*''\s*\r?\n)\s*Me\.Grid1\.BorderStyle = FlexCell\.BorderStyleEnum\.None\s*\r?\n.*?Me\.Grid1\.UncheckedImage = Nothing'
    $loc = [regex]::Match($content, 'Me\.Grid1\.Location = New System\.Drawing\.Point\([^)]+\)')
    $size = [regex]::Match($content, 'Me\.Grid1\.Size = New System\.Drawing\.Size\([^)]+\)')
    $tabindex = [regex]::Match($content, 'Me\.Grid1\.TabIndex = (\d+)')
    
    if ($loc.Success -and $size.Success -and $tabindex.Success) {
        $locVal = $loc.Value
        $sizeVal = $size.Value
        $tabVal = $tabindex.Value
        
        $replacement = @"
'Grid1
        '
        Me.Grid1.AllowUserToAddRows = False
        Me.Grid1.AllowUserToDeleteRows = False
        Me.Grid1.AllowUserToResizeRows = False
        Me.Grid1.BorderStyle = System.Windows.Forms.BorderStyle.None
        Me.Grid1.ColumnHeadersHeightSizeMode = System.Windows.Forms.DataGridViewColumnHeadersHeightSizeMode.AutoSize
        Me.Grid1.DefaultCellStyle.Font = New System.Drawing.Font("Arial Narrow", 26.0!)
        Me.Grid1.Dock = System.Windows.Forms.DockStyle.Fill
        $locVal
        Me.Grid1.Name = "Grid1"
        Me.Grid1.ReadOnly = True
        Me.Grid1.RowHeadersVisible = False
        Me.Grid1.RowTemplate.Height = 45
        Me.Grid1.ScrollBars = System.Windows.Forms.ScrollBars.None
        $sizeVal
        $tabVal
"@
        $content = $content -replace $pattern, $replacement
    }
    
    # Declaration
    $content = $content -replace 'Friend WithEvents Grid1 As FlexCell\.Grid', 'Friend WithEvents Grid1 As System.Windows.Forms.DataGridView'
    
    [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText($path, $content)
    Write-Host "  [FrmMain.Designer] $path"
}

# ============================================================
# JA01-JA04 FrmMain.vb: replace Init_Grid
# ============================================================
function Fix-FrmMainVb($path) {
    $content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText($path)
    
    $oldPattern = '(?s)Private Sub Init_Grid\(ByVal GridName As FlexCell\.Grid\).*?End Sub'
    $newMethod = @'
Private Sub Init_Grid(ByVal GridName As DataGridView)

        With GridName
            .Columns.Clear()
            .Rows.Clear()

            .Columns.Add("Col0", "")
            .Columns.Add("Col1", "No.")
            .Columns.Add("Col2", "I/O")
            .Columns.Add("Col3", "Dec.")

            .Columns(0).Width = 0
            .Columns(0).Visible = False
            .Columns(1).Width = 60
            .Columns(2).Width = 80
            .Columns(3).Width = 100

            For Each col As DataGridViewColumn In .Columns
                col.DefaultCellStyle.Alignment = DataGridViewContentAlignment.MiddleCenter
                col.HeaderCell.Style.Alignment = DataGridViewContentAlignment.MiddleCenter
                col.SortMode = DataGridViewColumnSortMode.NotSortable
            Next

        End With

    End Sub
'@
    $content = [regex]::Replace($content, $oldPattern, $newMethod)
    [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText($path, $content)
    Write-Host "  [FrmMain.vb] $path"
}

# ============================================================
# FrmPart.Designer.vb: replace Grid1 FlexCell properties
# ============================================================
function Fix-FrmPartDesigner($path) {
    $content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText($path)
    
    # Constructor
    $content = $content -replace 'Me\.Grid1 = New FlexCell\.Grid\(\)', 'Me.Grid1 = New System.Windows.Forms.DataGridView()'
    
    # Properties: replace from 'Me.Grid1.BorderStyle = FlexCell' to 'Me.Grid1.UncheckedImage = Nothing'
    $locMatch = [regex]::Match($content, 'Me\.Grid1\.Location = New System\.Drawing\.Point\([^)]+\)')
    $sizeMatch = [regex]::Match($content, 'Me\.Grid1\.Size = New System\.Drawing\.Size\([^)]+\)')
    $tabMatch = [regex]::Match($content, 'Me\.Grid1\.TabIndex = (\d+)')
    
    if ($locMatch.Success -and $sizeMatch.Success -and $tabMatch.Success) {
        $locVal = $locMatch.Value
        $sizeVal = $sizeMatch.Value
        $tabVal = $tabMatch.Value
        
        $pattern = "(?s)Me\.Grid1\.BorderStyle = FlexCell\.BorderStyleEnum\.FixedSingle\s*\r?\n.*?Me\.Grid1\.UncheckedImage = Nothing"
        $replacement = @"
Me.Grid1.AllowUserToAddRows = True
        Me.Grid1.AllowUserToDeleteRows = True
        Me.Grid1.BorderStyle = System.Windows.Forms.BorderStyle.FixedSingle
        Me.Grid1.ColumnHeadersHeightSizeMode = System.Windows.Forms.DataGridViewColumnHeadersHeightSizeMode.AutoSize
        Me.Grid1.DefaultCellStyle.Font = New System.Drawing.Font("Tahoma", 10.2!)
        $locVal
        Me.Grid1.Name = "Grid1"
        Me.Grid1.RowHeadersVisible = False
        Me.Grid1.RowTemplate.Height = 24
        $sizeVal
        $tabVal
"@
        $content = [regex]::Replace($content, $pattern, $replacement)
    }
    
    # Declaration
    $content = $content -replace 'Friend WithEvents Grid1 As FlexCell\.Grid', 'Friend WithEvents Grid1 As System.Windows.Forms.DataGridView'
    
    [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText($path, $content)
    Write-Host "  [FrmPart.Designer] $path"
}

# ============================================================
# FrmPart.vb: replace FlexCell API calls
# ============================================================
function Fix-FrmPartVb($path) {
    $content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText($path)
    
    # Remove commented FlexCell lines
    $content = $content -replace "(?m)^\s*'[^\r\n]*FlexCell[^\r\n]*\r?\n", ''
    
    # Replace SetDataBinding FlexCell calls
    $content = $content -replace '(?m)\s*Grid1\.BoldFixedCell = False\s*\r?\n', "`r`n"
    $content = $content -replace '(?m)\s*Grid1\.DisplayFocusRect = False\s*\r?\n', ''
    $content = $content -replace '(?m)\s*Grid1\.DisplayRowArrow = True\s*\r?\n', ''
    $content = $content -replace 'Grid1\.SetDataBinding\(myDataSet, "Table_PART"\)', 'Grid1.DataSource = myDataSet.Tables("Table_PART")'
    
    # Replace Grid1.Column(x).Width with Grid1.Columns(x).Width and hide col 0,1
    $content = $content -replace 'Grid1\.Column\((\d+)\)\.Width', 'Grid1.Columns($1).Width'
    
    # Remove Grid1.Column(x).Alignment lines
    $content = $content -replace '(?m)\s*Grid1\.Column\(\d+\)\.Alignment = FlexCell\.AlignmentEnum\.\w+\s*\r?\n', ''
    # Also handle Grid1.Columns(x).Alignment (already replaced)
    $content = $content -replace '(?m)\s*Grid1\.Columns\(\d+\)\.Alignment = FlexCell\.AlignmentEnum\.\w+\s*\r?\n', ''
    
    # Remove Grid1.Cell(0, x).Text lines (header text - DGV handles this via DataSource)
    $content = $content -replace '(?m)\s*Grid1\.Cell\(0, \d+\)\.Text = "[^"]*"\s*\r?\n', ''
    
    # Remove CellType/ComboBox lines
    $content = $content -replace '(?m)\s*Grid1\.Column\(\d+\)\.CellType = FlexCell\.CellTypeEnum\.\w+\s*\r?\n', ''
    $content = $content -replace '(?m)\s*Grid1\.Columns\(\d+\)\.CellType = FlexCell\.CellTypeEnum\.\w+\s*\r?\n', ''
    $content = $content -replace "(?m)\s*Grid1\.ComboBox\(\d+\)\.Items\.Add\([^\)]+\)\s*\r?\n", ''
    
    # Fix after width assignments: add Visible = False for col 0 and 1
    # We'll add it right after the DataSource line block
    # Actually, let's handle this by finding the width block end
    
    # Replace Save_Grid FlexCell calls
    $content = $content -replace 'Grid1\.EndCurrentEdit\(\)', 'Grid1.EndEdit()'
    
    # Replace TopRow/ActiveCell
    $oldSave = 'intTopRow = Grid1.TopRow
        intCurrentRow = Grid1.ActiveCell.Row
        intCurrentCol = Grid1.ActiveCell.Col'
    $newSave = @'
intTopRow = Grid1.FirstDisplayedScrollingRowIndex
        If Grid1.CurrentCell IsNot Nothing Then
            intCurrentRow = Grid1.CurrentCell.RowIndex
            intCurrentCol = Grid1.CurrentCell.ColumnIndex
        End If
'@
    $content = $content -replace [regex]::Escape($oldSave), $newSave
    
    # Replace re-bind block
    $oldRebind = @'
Grid1.AutoRedraw = False
        SetDataBinding()
        Grid1.Cell(intCurrentRow, intCurrentCol).SetFocus()
        Grid1.TopRow = intTopRow
        Grid1.AutoRedraw = True
        Grid1.Refresh()
'@
    $newRebind = @'
SetDataBinding()
        If intCurrentRow < Grid1.Rows.Count AndAlso intCurrentCol < Grid1.Columns.Count Then
            Grid1.CurrentCell = Grid1(intCurrentCol, intCurrentRow)
        End If
        If intTopRow >= 0 AndAlso intTopRow < Grid1.Rows.Count Then
            Grid1.FirstDisplayedScrollingRowIndex = intTopRow
        End If
        Grid1.Refresh()
'@
    $content = $content -replace [regex]::Escape($oldRebind), $newRebind
    
    # Add Columns(0).Visible = False after DataSource line if widths exist
    # Find pattern: Grid1.Columns(0).Width = 10\r\n...Grid1.Columns(1).Width = 0
    if ($content -match 'Grid1\.Columns\(1\)\.Width = 0') {
        $content = $content -replace '(Grid1\.Columns\(0\)\.Width = 10\s*\r?\n)', "`$1        Grid1.Columns(0).Visible = False`r`n"
        $content = $content -replace '(Grid1\.Columns\(1\)\.Width = 0\s*\r?\n)', "`$1        Grid1.Columns(1).Visible = False`r`n"
    }
    
    [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText($path, $content)
    Write-Host "  [FrmPart.vb] $path"
}

# ============================================================
# FrmSearch.vb
# ============================================================
function Fix-FrmSearchVb($path) {
    $content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText($path)
    
    # Remove commented FlexCell lines  
    $content = $content -replace "(?m)^\s*'[^\r\n]*FlexCell[^\r\n]*\r?\n", ''
    
    # Replace SetDataBinding
    $content = $content -replace '(?m)\s*Grid1\.BoldFixedCell = False\s*\r?\n', "`r`n"
    $content = $content -replace '(?m)\s*Grid1\.DisplayFocusRect = False\s*\r?\n', ''
    $content = $content -replace '(?m)\s*Grid1\.DisplayRowArrow = True\s*\r?\n', ''
    $content = $content -replace 'Grid1\.SetDataBinding\(myDataSet, "Table_Main"\)', 'Grid1.DataSource = myDataSet.Tables("Table_Main")'
    $content = $content -replace 'Grid1\.SetDataBinding\(myDataSet, "Table_Main_" & ComboBox1\.Text\)', 'Grid1.DataSource = myDataSet.Tables("Table_Main_" & ComboBox1.Text)'
    
    # Replace ExportToExcel with CSV export
    $oldExcel = '(?s)Private Sub ConvertExcel\(\).*?End Sub'
    $newExcel = @'
Private Sub ConvertExcel()
        Dim excel_name As String = Format(srcDtpStart.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "_" & Format(srcDtpEnd.Value, "yyyy-MM-dd")
        Dim filePath As String = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Excel\" & excel_name & ".csv"

        Try
            If Not System.IO.Directory.Exists(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Excel") Then
                System.IO.Directory.CreateDirectory(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Excel")
            End If

            Using sw As New System.IO.StreamWriter(filePath, False, System.Text.Encoding.Default)
                Dim headers As New System.Text.StringBuilder()
                For Each col As DataGridViewColumn In Grid1.Columns
                    If headers.Length > 0 Then headers.Append(",")
                    headers.Append("""" & col.HeaderText.Replace("""", """""") & """")
                Next
                sw.WriteLine(headers.ToString())

                For Each row As DataGridViewRow In Grid1.Rows
                    Dim line As New System.Text.StringBuilder()
                    For Each cell As DataGridViewCell In row.Cells
                        If line.Length > 0 Then line.Append(",")
                        Dim val As String = If(cell.Value IsNot Nothing, cell.Value.ToString(), "")
                        line.Append("""" & val.Replace("""", """""") & """")
                    Next
                    sw.WriteLine(line.ToString())
                Next
            End Using

            MsgBox("Done.", MsgBoxStyle.Exclamation)
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox(ex.Message, MsgBoxStyle.Critical)
        End Try
    End Sub
'@
    $content = [regex]::Replace($content, $oldExcel, $newExcel)
    
    [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText($path, $content)
    Write-Host "  [FrmSearch.vb] $path"
}

# ============================================================
# FrmWorkStandardSet.vb
# ============================================================
function Fix-FrmWorkStdVb($path) {
    $content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText($path)
    
    # Replace Grid_Init
    $oldInit = '(?s)Private Sub Grid_Init\(\).*?End Sub'
    $newInit = @'
Private Sub Grid_Init()
        With Grid1
            .Columns.Clear()
            .Rows.Clear()

            .Columns.Add("Col0", "")
            .Columns.Add("Col1", "")
            .Columns.Add("Col2", "ImageFile")

            .Columns(0).Width = 10
            .Columns(0).Visible = False
            .Columns(1).Width = 30
            .Columns(2).Width = 500

            .AllowUserToAddRows = False
        End With
    End Sub
'@
    $content = [regex]::Replace($content, $oldInit, $newInit)
    
    # Replace Load_Grid: .AddItem -> Grid1.Rows.Add and remove With/End With wrapper
    $oldLoad = '(?s)Private Sub Load_Grid\(\).*?End Sub'
    $loadMatch = [regex]::Match($content, $oldLoad)
    if ($loadMatch.Success) {
        $newLoad = @'
Private Sub Load_Grid()

        Connection_Open_MDB()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Grid_Init()

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Image", Mdb_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount <= 0 Then

            'MsgBox("Empty Point Info.")

        ElseIf Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            Grid1.Rows.Add(Nothing, Rs.Fields("ID").Value, Rs.Fields("StandardFile").Value)

        Else

            Rs.MoveFirst()
            Do Until Rs.EOF
                Grid1.Rows.Add(Nothing, Rs.Fields("ID").Value, Rs.Fields("StandardFile").Value)
                Rs.MoveNext()
            Loop

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close_MDB()

    End Sub
'@
        $content = [regex]::Replace($content, $oldLoad, $newLoad)
    }
    
    # Replace Save_Grid
    $oldSave = '(?s)Private Sub Save_Grid\(\).*?End Sub'
    $saveMatch = [regex]::Match($content, $oldSave)
    if ($saveMatch.Success) {
        $newSave = @'
Private Sub Save_Grid()

        Connection_Open_MDB()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim i As Integer

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Image", Mdb_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount <= 0 Then

            'MsgBox("Empty Point Info.")

        ElseIf Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            Rs.Fields("StandardFile").Value = If(Grid1.Rows(0).Cells(2).Value IsNot Nothing, Grid1.Rows(0).Cells(2).Value.ToString(), "")
            Rs.Update()

        Else

            Rs.MoveFirst()
            i = 0

            Do Until Rs.EOF

                Rs.Fields("StandardFile").Value = If(Grid1.Rows(i).Cells(2).Value IsNot Nothing, Grid1.Rows(i).Cells(2).Value.ToString(), "")
                i = i + 1
                Rs.Update()
                Rs.MoveNext()

            Loop

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close_MDB()

    End Sub
'@
        $content = [regex]::Replace($content, $oldSave, $newSave)
    }
    
    # Replace MouseClick handler
    $oldClick = '(?s)Private Sub Grid1_MouseClick1\(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System\.Windows\.Forms\.MouseEventArgs\) Handles Grid1\.MouseClick.*?End Sub'
    $newClick = @'
Private Sub Grid1_MouseClick1(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.Windows.Forms.MouseEventArgs) Handles Grid1.MouseClick

        Dim tmp As String

        If Grid1.CurrentRow Is Nothing Then Return
        Click_Index = Grid1.CurrentRow.Index
        tmp = If(Grid1.Rows(Click_Index).Cells(2).Value IsNot Nothing, Grid1.Rows(Click_Index).Cells(2).Value.ToString(), "")

        Dim Open As New OpenFileDialog()

        Open.ShowDialog()

        If Open.FileName = "" Then
            Grid1.Rows(Click_Index).Cells(2).Value = tmp
        Else
            Grid1.Rows(Click_Index).Cells(2).Value = Open.FileName
        End If

    End Sub
'@
    $content = [regex]::Replace($content, $oldClick, $newClick)
    
    # Replace Delete button: Grid1.Cell(Click_Index, 1).Text
    $content = $content -replace 'Grid1\.Cell\(Click_Index, 1\)\.Text', 'If(Grid1.Rows(Click_Index).Cells(1).Value IsNot Nothing, Grid1.Rows(Click_Index).Cells(1).Value.ToString(), "")'
    
    # Remove Grid1_Load handler
    $content = $content -replace '(?s)\s*Private Sub Grid1_Load\(sender As Object, e As EventArgs\) Handles Grid1\.Load\s*\r?\n\s*End Sub', ''
    
    [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText($path, $content)
    Write-Host "  [FrmWorkStd.vb] $path"
}

# ============================================================
# FrmAngleSet.vb (JA03 only) - similar to FrmPart pattern
# ============================================================
function Fix-FrmAngleSetVb($path) {
    $content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText($path)
    
    # Remove commented FlexCell lines
    $content = $content -replace "(?m)^\s*'[^\r\n]*FlexCell[^\r\n]*\r?\n", ''
    
    # Replace SetDataBinding
    $content = $content -replace '(?m)\s*Grid1\.BoldFixedCell = False\s*\r?\n', "`r`n"
    $content = $content -replace '(?m)\s*Grid1\.DisplayFocusRect = False\s*\r?\n', ''
    $content = $content -replace '(?m)\s*Grid1\.DisplayRowArrow = True\s*\r?\n', ''
    $content = $content -replace 'Grid1\.SetDataBinding\(myDataSet, "Table_Angle"\)', 'Grid1.DataSource = myDataSet.Tables("Table_Angle")'
    
    # Remove Grid1.Cell(0, x).Text header lines
    $content = $content -replace '(?m)\s*Grid1\.Cell\(0, \d+\)\.Text = "[^"]*"\s*\r?\n', ''
    
    # Replace Grid1.Column(x) with Grid1.Columns(x)
    $content = $content -replace 'Grid1\.Column\((\d+)\)\.Width', 'Grid1.Columns($1).Width'
    
    # Remove Alignment lines
    $content = $content -replace '(?m)\s*Grid1\.Column\(\d+\)\.Alignment = FlexCell\.AlignmentEnum\.\w+\s*\r?\n', ''
    $content = $content -replace '(?m)\s*Grid1\.Columns\(\d+\)\.Alignment = FlexCell\.AlignmentEnum\.\w+\s*\r?\n', ''
    
    # Add Visible = False for col 1 after width 0
    if ($content -match 'Grid1\.Columns\(1\)\.Width = 0') {
        $content = $content -replace '(Grid1\.Columns\(1\)\.Width = 0\s*\r?\n)', "`$1        Grid1.Columns(1).Visible = False`r`n"
    }
    
    # Replace Save_Grid1 FlexCell calls
    $content = $content -replace 'Grid1\.EndCurrentEdit\(\)', 'Grid1.EndEdit()'
    
    $oldSave = 'intTopRow = Grid1.TopRow
        intCurrentRow = Grid1.ActiveCell.Row
        intCurrentCol = Grid1.ActiveCell.Col'
    $newSave = @'
intTopRow = Grid1.FirstDisplayedScrollingRowIndex
        If Grid1.CurrentCell IsNot Nothing Then
            intCurrentRow = Grid1.CurrentCell.RowIndex
            intCurrentCol = Grid1.CurrentCell.ColumnIndex
        End If
'@
    $content = $content -replace [regex]::Escape($oldSave), $newSave
    
    $oldRebind = @'
Grid1.AutoRedraw = False
        SetDataBinding()
        Grid1.Cell(intCurrentRow, intCurrentCol).SetFocus()
        Grid1.TopRow = intTopRow
        Grid1.AutoRedraw = True
        Grid1.Refresh()
'@
    $newRebind = @'
SetDataBinding()
        If intCurrentRow < Grid1.Rows.Count AndAlso intCurrentCol < Grid1.Columns.Count Then
            Grid1.CurrentCell = Grid1(intCurrentCol, intCurrentRow)
        End If
        If intTopRow >= 0 AndAlso intTopRow < Grid1.Rows.Count Then
            Grid1.FirstDisplayedScrollingRowIndex = intTopRow
        End If
        Grid1.Refresh()
'@
    $content = $content -replace [regex]::Escape($oldRebind), $newRebind
    
    [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText($path, $content)
    Write-Host "  [FrmAngleSet.vb] $path"
}

input.content:
# FlexCell to DataGridView Migration Plan

## Overview
Replace all FlexCell.Grid references with standard DataGridView across 5 VB.NET projects in the NX4C FRT solution.

## Projects & Files to Modify

### 1. JA01 (9 files)
- `FRT JA01.vbproj` - Remove FlexCell reference (lines 89-92)
- `FrmMain.Designer.vb` - Grid1 constructor (line 255), properties (lines 3240-3252), declaration (line 3502)
- `FrmMain.vb` - Init_Grid method (lines 200-244)
- `FrmPart.Designer.vb` - Grid1 constructor (line 27), properties (lines 99-110), declaration (line 800)
- `FrmPart.vb` - SetDataBinding (lines 55-99), Save_Grid (lines 121-163)
- `FrmSearch.Designer.vb` - Grid1 constructor (line 33), properties (lines 128-138), declaration (line 172)
- `FrmSearch.vb` - SetDataBinding (lines 24-28), ConvertExcel (lines 58-68)
- `FrmWorkStandardSet.Designer.vb` - Grid1 constructor (line 26), properties (lines 43-55), declaration (line 97)
- `FrmWorkStandardSet.vb` - Grid_Init, Load_Grid, Save_Grid, MouseClick, Delete, Grid1_Load handler

### 2. JA02 (10 files)
- `FRT JA02.vbproj` - Remove FlexCell reference (lines 89-92)
- `FRT PWR 2.vbproj` - Remove FlexCell reference (lines 89-92)
- Same form files as JA01 (FrmMain, FrmPart, FrmSearch, FrmWorkStandardSet)
- JA02 FrmPart.vb has additional ComboBox setup (lines 60-86) to remove

### 3. JA03 (12 files)
- `FRT JA03.vbproj` - Remove FlexCell reference (lines 93-96)
- Same form files as JA01 + FrmAngleSet
- `FrmAngleSet.Designer.vb` - Grid1 constructor, properties, declaration
- `FrmAngleSet.vb` - SetDataBinding, Save_Grid1 (same pattern as FrmPart Save_Grid)
- JA03 FrmPart.vb has ComboBox setup to remove

### 4. JA04 (9 files)
- `FRT JA04.vbproj` - Remove FlexCell reference (lines 93-96)
- Same form files as JA01
- JA04 FrmPart.vb has ComboBox setup to remove

### 5. SERVER SEARCH (3 files)
- `SERVEr Search.vbproj` - Remove FlexCell reference (line 67, single-line format)
- `FrmMain.Designer.vb` - Grid1 constructor, properties, declaration
- `FrmMain.vb` - SetDataBinding, ConvertExcel (ExportToExcel -> CSV)

## Approach: PowerShell Script
Use a single PowerShell script with functions for each file type pattern:
1. `Remove-FlexCellRef` - Remove FlexCell reference block from .vbproj
2. `Fix-FrmMainDesigner` - Replace Grid1 in FrmMain.Designer.vb (I/O Monitor)
3. `Fix-FrmMainVb` - Replace Init_Grid method
4. `Fix-FrmPartDesigner` - Replace Grid1 in FrmPart.Designer.vb (Part Master)
5. `Fix-FrmPartVb` - Replace SetDataBinding, Save_Grid
6. `Fix-FrmSearchDesigner` - Replace Grid1 in FrmSearch.Designer.vb
7. `Fix-FrmSearchVb` - Replace SetDataBinding, ConvertExcel (CSV export)
8. `Fix-FrmWorkStdDesigner` - Replace Grid1 in FrmWorkStandardSet.Designer.vb
9. `Fix-FrmWorkStdVb` - Replace Grid_Init, Load_Grid, Save_Grid, MouseClick, Delete, remove Grid1_Load
10. `Fix-FrmAngleSetDesigner` - JA03 only
11. `Fix-FrmAngleSetVb` - JA03 only
12. `Fix-ServerSearchDesigner` - SERVER SEARCH specific
13. `Fix-ServerSearchVb` - SERVER SEARCH specific

## Key Replacements Per File Type

### .vbproj
- Remove 3-line `<Reference Include="FlexCell...">` block or 1-line self-closing variant

### FrmMain.Designer.vb (JA01-JA04)
- `New FlexCell.Grid()` -> `New System.Windows.Forms.DataGridView()`
- FlexCell properties -> DataGridView properties (keep Location, Size, TabIndex, Dock)
- `FlexCell.Grid` declaration -> `System.Windows.Forms.DataGridView`

### FrmMain.vb (JA01-JA04)
- `Init_Grid(ByVal GridName As FlexCell.Grid)` -> `Init_Grid(ByVal GridName As DataGridView)` with DataGridView column setup

### FrmPart.Designer.vb
- Same constructor/declaration/properties pattern

### FrmPart.vb
- `Grid1.SetDataBinding(myDataSet, "Table_PART")` -> `Grid1.DataSource = myDataSet.Tables("Table_PART")`
- `Grid1.Column(x).Width` -> `Grid1.Columns(x).Width` + Visible=False for hidden cols
- Remove all FlexCell enum references (Alignment, CellType, ComboBox)
- `Grid1.EndCurrentEdit()` -> `Grid1.EndEdit()`
- `Grid1.TopRow` -> `Grid1.FirstDisplayedScrollingRowIndex`
- `Grid1.ActiveCell.Row/Col` -> `Grid1.CurrentCell.RowIndex/ColumnIndex`
- `Grid1.Cell(r,c).SetFocus()` -> `Grid1.CurrentCell = Grid1(c,r)`

### FrmSearch.vb
- SetDataBinding: same pattern as FrmPart
- `Grid1.ExportToExcel(...)` -> CSV StreamWriter export

### FrmWorkStandardSet.vb
- Grid_Init: FlexCell column setup -> DataGridView Columns.Add
- Load_Grid: `.AddItem(...)` -> `Grid1.Rows.Add(...)`
- Save_Grid: `Grid1.Cell(i, 2).Text` -> `Grid1.Rows(i).Cells(2).Value?.ToString()` (1-based to 0-based)
- MouseClick: `Grid1.Selection.FirstRow` -> `Grid1.CurrentRow.Index`
- Delete: same Cell -> Rows(x).Cells(y).Value pattern
- Remove Grid1_Load handler

### FrmAngleSet (JA03 only)
- Same patterns as FrmPart for Designer and code-behind

### SERVER SEARCH
- Designer: similar to FrmSearch (no border, readonly)
- Code: SetDataBinding + CSV export

## Execution
Run PowerShell script that applies all changes in sequence: JA01 -> JA02 -> JA03 -> JA04 -> SERVER SEARCH.

## Verification
After script runs, grep for remaining `FlexCell` references to confirm complete removal.

content.text:
계획 요약:

**전체 5개 프로젝트, 약 43개 파일**에서 FlexCell.Grid를 DataGridView로 교체합니다.

**프로젝트별 수정 대상:**
- **JA01**: vbproj + FrmMain(Designer/vb) + FrmPart(Designer/vb) + FrmSearch(Designer/vb) + FrmWorkStandardSet(Designer/vb) = 9 파일
- **JA02**: 위와 동일 + FRT PWR 2.vbproj = 10 파일
- **JA03**: JA01과 동일 + FrmAngleSet(Designer/vb) = 12 파일
- **JA04**: JA01과 동일 = 9 파일
- **SERVER SEARCH**: vbproj + FrmMain(Designer/vb) = 3 파일

**접근법:** PowerShell 스크립트로 정규식 기반 일괄 치환. 파일 패턴별 함수 13개 정의 후 순차 적용.

**주요 치환 내용:**
1. vbproj에서 FlexCell 참조 제거
2. Designer.vb에서 FlexCell.Grid 생성/속성/선언을 DataGridView로 교체 (Location, Size, TabIndex 값 보존)
3. FrmMain.vb Init_Grid를 DataGridView 열 설정으로 교체
4. FrmPart.vb에서 SetDataBinding/Save_Grid의 FlexCell API를 DataGridView API로 교체
5. FrmSearch.vb에서 ExportToExcel을 CSV StreamWriter로 교체
6. FrmWorkStandardSet.vb에서 Cell/AddItem/Selection을 Rows/Cells/CurrentRow로 교체 (1-based -> 0-based 인덱스 보정)
7. FrmAngleSet(JA03)도 동일 패턴 적용

실행 승인 시 PowerShell 스크립트를 실행하고, 완료 후 `FlexCell` 잔존 여부를 grep으로 검증합니다.
